auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to get started.
auth.name: Display name
auth.registerSubtitleShort: Track your favorite anime and share your reviews.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: Check your inbox — if the account exists, a link is on its way.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in.
auth.verifySuccess: Email verified. You can now sign in.

review.title: Community reviews
review.bodyPlaceholder: What did you think of this anime? (optional)
review.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first.

watchlist.loginRationale: Track progress, rate, and get new episode alerts.

pricing.title: Pay if you want.
pricing.subtitle: Miru will always be free for the essentials. The Sympathisant plan exists for those who want to support the project — not to unlock features.
pricing.freeDescription: Everything essential. No ads, no limits.
pricing.proDescription: Support development without changing your experience.
pricing.noLockBody: The Sympathisant plan grants nothing the free version doesn't — it's a contribution, not a paywall. If in doubt, stick with free, all good.
pricing.alreadyActive: You've been a Sympathisant since {date} — thank you.
pricing.manageInSettings: You can manage your subscription from settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.billingActiveDescription: Active since {date}. You can manage payment and cancel anytime.
settings.billingInactiveDescription: Support the project for €4/month. Nothing unlocks — it's purely a contribution.
settings.languageDescription: Pick the language shown across Miru. Changes apply immediately.
settings.emailNotifsSubtitle: Choose what deserves to land in your inbox.
settings.emailNewEpisodesDesc: When an episode from your watchlist airs.
settings.emailWeeklyRecapDesc: Weekly Sunday digest of what you watched.
settings.emailCommentsDesc: When someone replies to one of your reviews.
settings.quietSubtitle: No notifications between these two hours.
settings.dangerDescription: Deleting your account erases watchlist, reviews and history. Irreversible.

lifetimePage.metaDescription: Your stats since day one on Miru.
lifetimePage.title: Lifetime stats
lifetimePage.joinedLine: Everything you've done on Miru since you joined in {month}.
lifetimePage.emptyCompleted: No anime marked as completed yet. Come back when a few are in the list.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.emptyBody: No notifications yet. New episodes and recaps will show up here.

calendarPage.metaDescription: Airing schedule of ongoing anime on Miru.
calendarPage.title: Calendar
calendarPage.apiUnreachable: Could not reach the API. The calendar will reappear when the service restarts.

topPage.metaDescription: The 100 highest-rated anime in the Miru catalog.
topPage.title: Top 100
topPage.subtitle: Computed from the aggregated AniList & Miru review averages.

searchPage.hint: Tip: hit ⌘K to open the quick search palette.
searchPage.promptEmpty: Type a query to explore the catalog.

watchlistPage.emptyWatchingDesc: Find an anime you like and add it to track episodes here.
watchlistPage.emptyPlannedDesc: Mark intriguing titles as “Planned” to find them here later.
watchlistPage.emptyOnHoldDesc: When you pause an anime, it lands here until you come back to it.
watchlistPage.emptyCompletedDesc: Finished titles show up here, ready to rate and share.
watchlistPage.emptyDroppedDesc: Anime you let go land here — no judgement.

helpPage.title: Help
helpPage.notFoundQ: Didn't find what you were looking for?
helpPage.articleScoreDiff: Difference between Miru and AniList ratings

listsPage.metaDescription: Your Miru lists and the community's public lists.
listsPage.title: Lists
listsPage.emptyAnonymous: Sign in to manage your lists and likes.
listsPage.emptyMine: No list yet. Hit “Create a list” to start.
listsPage.emptyLiked: You haven't liked any public list yet.

profile.watchlistCardBody: Find the anime you follow, pause, or plan to watch.

security.title: Security
security.sessionsEmpty: No active sessions. You'll have to sign in again on next load.
security.revokeConfirm: Revoke this session? The device will be signed out immediately.

tfa.title: 2FA · Authenticator app
tfa.enabledHint: Enabled — a 6-digit code is required at each sign-in.
tfa.disabledHint: Add a second step with Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy…
tfa.scanSubtitle: With your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code shown.
tfa.backupSubtitle1: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. They let you sign in if you lose your phone.
